script: const getAudioPath=async(e,a,n,t)=>{let o=require("path"),i=require("fs"),m=new Date().getTime()+".mp3";return i.existsSync(o.join(n,"tts"))?(i.writeFileSync(o.join(n,"tts",m),await getTTSAudio(e,a,t)),console.log("folder already exists")):(i.mkdirSync(o.join(n,"tts")),i.writeFileSync(o.join(n,"tts",m),await getTTSAudio(e,a,t)),console.log("folder created successfully")),o.join(n,"tts",m)},getTTSAudio=async(e,a,n)=>{let t=n.apiKey||"",o=n.baseUrl||"https://api.openai.com",i=n.model||"gpt-4o-mini-tts",m=n.voiceName||"coral",r=a?Math.min(4,Math.max(.25,a)):1,l=`${o}/v1/audio/speech`,s=require("axios");return new Promise((a,n)=>{s.post(l,{model:i,input:e,voice:m,speed:r,response_format:"mp3"},{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${t}`,"Content-Type":"application/json"},responseType:"arraybuffer"}).then(e=>{console.log(e),a(e.data)}).catch(e=>{console.log(e),n("")})})},getTTSVoice=async e=>{let a=[{name:"alloy",gender:"female"},{name:"ash",gender:"male"},{name:"ballad",gender:"male"},{name:"coral",gender:"female"},{name:"echo",gender:"male"},{name:"fable",gender:"male"},{name:"nova",gender:"female"},{name:"onyx",gender:"male"},{name:"sage",gender:"female"},{name:"shimmer",gender:"female"},{name:"verse",gender:"male"},{name:"marin",gender:"female"},{name:"cedar",gender:"male"},];return Promise.resolve(a.map(a=>({name:a.name,gender:a.gender,locale:"en",displayName:`OpenAI TTS - ${a.name}`,plugin:"openai-tts-voice-plugin",config:{...e,voiceName:a.name}})))};global.getAudioPath=getAudioPath,global.getTTSVoice=getTTSVoice;
